Which Mode Should I Use?

Standard Decimation Cost: 1 Credit Best for: Reducing file size while keeping the exact same geometry structure. Good for CAD models or models that are already clean. How it works: It intelligently re

Premium Remesh (Bake) Cost: 2 Credits Best for: 3D Scans, Photogrammetry, and Organic shapes. How it works: It builds a brand new "clean" mesh (Retopology) and "bakes" the details from the high-qualit

Supported File Formats - GLB (Recommended): The best format. All geometry, materials, and textures are embedded in a single file. Just drag and drop. Why preferred? No missing textures, no external de

Pricing & Credits We use a simple credit system. You purchase a pack of credits, and they are deducted when you run a job. ALREADY HAVE CREDITS? BUYING MORE ADDS TO YOUR CREDIT BALANCE. - Failed Jobs:

Workflow Overview The API uses an asynchronous 3-step workflow: - Submit: POST your model to /optimize and receive a job ID - Poll: Check /job/:id until status is Completed or Failed - Download: Fetch
POST /optimize Submit a 3D model for processing. Returns a job ID for polling. Requires authentication.

Request (multipart/form-data) Field Type Required Description file file Yes 3D model file (.obj, .fbx, .glb, .gltf), .zip, or multiple files (model + .mtl + textures). Max 50 texture files. mode strin
Response (Success - 200) { "jobId": "1734012345678", "status": "processing" } Header X-Credits-Remaining contains your updated balance.
Error Responses Status Meaning 400 Bad request (no valid 3D model, missing external buffers, etc.) 401 Unauthorized (invalid or missing API key) 402 Payment required (insufficient credits)
GET /job/:id Poll job status. No authentication required.
Response (Processing) { "status": "Processing" }

Response (Completed) { "status": { "Completed": { "output_size": 245678, "glb_url": "/download/1734012345678/model_opt.glb", "usdz_url": "/download/1734012345678/model_opt.usdz", "expires_at": "2024-1
Response (Failed) { "status": { "Failed": { "error": "Timeout" } } }

Webhooks If you provide a callback_url when submitting a job, we'll POST the result to your endpoint when the job completes or fails. This is ideal for batch processing where polling many jobs is impr
Webhook Payload { "jobId": "1734012345678", "status": { "Completed": { "output_size": 245678, "glb_url": "/download/1734012345678/model_opt.glb", "usdz_url": "/download/1734012345678/model_opt.usdz",
GET /credits Get your current credit balance. Requires authentication.
Response { "credits": 97 }
GET /history Get your transaction history (last 50). Requires authentication.
GET /config Get current pricing and configuration. No authentication required.

Error Codes Status Meaning 400 Bad Request — No supported 3D model found in upload 401 Unauthorized — Missing or invalid API key 402 Payment Required — Insufficient credits 404 Not Found — Job ID or r
Billing Notes - Decimate costs 1 credit per job - Remesh costs 2 credits per job

1. Introduction Welcome to MeshOpt ("we," "our," or "us"). We are committed to protecting your privacy and ensuring the security of your 3D assets. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, an
2. Information We Collect Personal Information: Email address (during payment/checkout), payment information (processed securely by Stripe - we do not store full credit card numbers). Usage Data: API
3. How We Use Your Information Service Provision: To provide the 3D optimization service, manage your credit balance, and authenticate your API requests. Communications: To send transaction receipts,

4. 3D File Handling & Security Your Intellectual Property: You retain full ownership of all files you upload and the optimized files we generate. We claim no ownership rights. Processing: Files are tr

5. Data Retention 3D Files: All uploaded files and generated results are automatically deleted from our servers after 1 hour . Account Data: We retain billing emails and transaction history indefinite
6. Third-Party Services Stripe: We use Stripe to process payments. We receive confirmation that payment succeeded and your email address. See Stripe's Privacy Policy . No Analytics or Tracking: We do

7. Your Rights You have the right to: Access your personal data, Correct inaccurate data, Delete your account and data, Export your transaction history (available in the app), and Object to processing

8. Security Measures We implement industry-standard measures: SSL/TLS encryption, secure database with access controls, file isolation during processing, automatic deletion after processing, no perman

9. Cookies & Tracking We use a secure, HttpOnly session cookie for authentication. This cookie is encrypted and cannot be accessed by JavaScript, protecting you from XSS attacks. We do NOT use analyti
10. Changes to This Policy We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. The "Last Updated" date will reflect when changes were made. For material changes, we will notify users via email.
11. Contact Us If you have questions, concerns, or requests regarding this Privacy Policy or your personal data, please use our Contact Form . We will respond to privacy inquiries within 30 days.

v1.0.7beta (2026-01-03) - AI Mesh Support: Added automatic vertex merging and cleanup for AI-generated meshes. Both Decimate and Remesh modes now handle overlapping vertices and loose geometry that pr

v1.0.6beta (2026-01-02) - MCP Server: Added Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for AI assistant integration. Claude Desktop, Cursor, and other MCP-compatible tools can now optimize meshes directly vi
v1.0.5beta (2025-12-29) - OBJ Texture Fix: Fixed inverted textures on OBJ files (especially from ZBrush) by correcting UV coordinate orientation during GLB export.
v1.0.4beta (2025-12-27) - 512px Texture Size: Added 512px texture size option for mobile/AR optimization of simple and small items.

v1.0.3beta (2025-12-26) - GLB Inspector Enhanced: Added interactive 3D preview viewport with orbit controls, animation playback, scene hierarchy tree, and optimization recommendations. - New Tool - Po
v1.0.2beta (2025-12-24) - Searchable Help: Added search functionality to the Help & Guide modal for quick navigation.
v1.0.1beta (2025-12-22) - Initial public release. - Core Optimization: Support for Decimation (polygon reduction) and Remeshing (clean topology generation). - File Formats: Process .glb, .gltf, .obj,

Founder's Story × I was supposed to code a 3D printer project for myself while on a working vacation in NH in early Dec 2025. I told an LLM about my upcoming needs, but it misunderstood me. Instead, it told me about 3D Mesh, which actually sounded interesting. So, I built that instead. I'm not
Danger Zone Regenerate Key This will invalidate your current key immediately. Any scripts using the old key will stop working.
Drag and drop your 3D file here. Supports GLB, OBJ, FBX, GLTF, and ZIP files.
Choose between Decimate (reduce polygon count) or Remesh + Bake (retopology with texture baking).
Adjust the quality ratio for decimation. Lower means less detail, higher means more detail.
Set the target number of faces for remesh mode.
Select texture resolution for remesh: 1024, 2048, or 4096 pixels.
Enter your API key to authenticate. Keys start with sk_ or fr_.
For OBJ files, add optional .mtl material file and texture images.
